title: diplostephium humile
intro: Diplostephium humile is a type of flowering plant native to South America, specifically in the mountainous regions of Ecuador and Peru. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Diplostephium humile include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to help with wound healing and skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are often applied topically or consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
